title: Moore's Law Nuance
script_summary: Explores the complexities of Moore's law beyond popular misconceptions.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about Moore's law nuance than social media does.
Moore's law suggests that transistor density doubles roughly every two years. But is it that simple?
Advancements aren't just about speed; it's about innovation limits and economic factors too!
Studies show that as we approach physical limits, growth may slow. Yet, technology evolves in unexpected ways.
Understanding this nuance helps us see the future of tech is about more than just speed. It’s about creativity.
Want to dive deeper into tech mysteries? Hit that follow button for more!
